diffs.name: Jupiter Gold & Silver Fund L EUR Acc
diffs.rationale: THEMATIC_EQUITY gold/mining/precious-metals fund. Setting is_sector_fund=true + sector_focus=PRECIOUS_METALS enables existing engine rule L61 to correctly exclude profiles <= 4. No engine code change required. Expected result: compatible_profiles=[5..10].
